Nxf7! is an aggressive Knight sacrifice. With no sensible way to decline, Black's King becomes exposed while White gains momentum in development. ==Theory table== {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}}. :'''1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bc4 Nf6 4.Ng5 d5 5.exd5 Nxd5'''
